title: No dull moments
principle: Every second competes with the 'leave' button. Any stretch with no forward motion, stimulation, or stakes is a retention leak.
rule: Audit the edit for dead air: trim pauses, cut filler, keep visual/audio stimulation continuous. If a beat isn't advancing story or delivering value, remove it.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
